column1: Complications to trial and issues arising in free text

Outcome time points were originally 38 weeks and one year. These were changed (prior to trial commencement) to 50 weeks and one year. The last clinic visit in this report was at 50 weeks. I feel it was an oversight that the one year time point remained in the registry.
